metadata.description: The Azure region where resources will be deployed
Base name for the deployment. MUST be short because the RP creates hosted RGs like <name>-HostedResources-<nonce>.
When false, enclaves (and workloads) are skipped – deploy communities only (for phased troubleshooting).
Number of Azure Virtual Enclave communities to deploy (1-10). Must match the length of communityConfigs array.
Enable governedServiceList emission (uses built-in defaults when true).
Default diagnostic destination applied when an enclave does not specify one (CommunityOnly | EnclaveOnly | Both).
Principal object IDs (users, groups, service principals) to assign Contributor at all scopes (community, enclave, workload). Empty = no automatic contributor assignments.

Enable emission of the governedServiceList into the community properties
Override entries for governedServiceList (match on serviceId). Each object may include serviceId, option, policyAction, enforcement.

When false, enclaves (and workloads) are skipped for phased deployments

variables._validationParts: [concat(if(variables('_needsCustomButMissing'), createArray('customCidrRange required when networkSize==custom'), createArray()), if(variables('_hasRangeButNotCustom'), createArray('customCidrRange must be omitted unless networkSize==custom'), createArray()), if(variables('_maintenanceOnMissingJustification'), createArray('maintenance.justification required when maintenance.mode==On'), createArray()))]

resources.name: [parameters('enclaveName')]
resources.properties: [union(createObject('communityResourceId', parameters('communityResourceId'), 'bastionEnabled', parameters('enclaveConfig').bastionEnabled, 'enclaveVirtualNetwork', shallowMerge(createArray(createObject('networkName', parameters('enclaveConfig').networkName, 'networkSize', if(not(empty(tryGet(parameters('enclaveConfig'), 'networkSize'))), if(equals(toLower(parameters('enclaveConfig').networkSize), 'custom'), 'custom', replace(parameters('enclaveConfig').networkSize, '/', '')), '24'), 'allowSubnetCommunication', bool(tryGet(parameters('enclaveConfig'), 'allowSubnetCommunication'))), if(and(equals(toLower(tryGet(parameters('enclaveConfig'), 'networkSize')), 'custom'), not(empty(tryGet(parameters('enclaveConfig'), 'customCidrRange')))), createObject('customCidrRange', parameters('enclaveConfig').customCidrRange), createObject()), createObject('subnetConfigurations', createArray(createObject('subnetName', 'workload-subnet', 'networkPrefixSize', 26), createObject('subnetName', 'management-subnet', 'networkPrefixSize', 28))))), 'enclaveDefaultSettings', createObject('diagnosticDestination', if(contains(createArray('CommunityOnly', 'EnclaveOnly', 'Both'), tryGet(parameters('enclaveConfig'), 'diagnosticDestination')), parameters('enclaveConfig').diagnosticDestination, parameters('diagnosticDestinationDefault'))), 'maintenanceModeConfiguration', variables('enclaveMaintenanceMode')), if(variables('_validationFailed'), createObject('validationError', variables('_validationMessage')), createObject()))]
